heading: DEFINITIONS
operative_text:
In this subchapter:
(1) "Adult education" means services and instruction provided below the college level for adults by an eligible entity granted a charter under this subchapter.
(1-a) "Eligible entity" means an entity described by Section 12.256.
(2) "Program," unless the context indicates otherwise, means the adult high school charter school program under this subchapter.

defined_terms.definition_excerpt: "Adult education" means services and instruction provided below the college level for adults by an eligible entity granted a charter under this subchapter.
"Eligible entity" means an entity described by Section 12.256.
"Program," unless the context indicates otherwise, means the adult high school charter school program under this subchapter.
